title: The Rescue Pushes Forward
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8. The central beat is the rescue pushes forward.
scene: The scene focuses on the rescue pushes forward, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: gyaha haha!!! What a funny guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They're all idiots, so they haven't realized!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What the? My mouth won't move why...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: He's a Demon masquerading as a man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: OH NO!!! BROWNBEARD HAS BECOME QUITE DANGEROUS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Shuroro roro!! And now for the finisher

summary: The Rescue Pushes Forward. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
